description: Component property schemas — shared between frontend, backend, and CLI

props.name: resize
props.description: Resize direction: vertical | horizontal | both | none

props.name: mode
props.description: Display mode: embedded | modal | drawer | page

props.name: contextFields
props.description: Fields to include as AI context

props.name: size
props.description: Font size: small | medium | large | xlarge

props.name: fit
props.description: Object fit: cover | contain | fill | scale-down

props.name: type
props.description: Button type: primary | secondary | success | warning | danger | link

props.name: display
props.description: Display: block | inline-block | flex | grid | none
